'''Torvin Xyn''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] spy. Even in his Human disguise, he had shoulders as wide as a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee's]]. He was killed by [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] with two other spies onboard a conference room in the ''[[Right to Rule]]'' where a Yuuzhan Vong collaborators were summoned when he removed his ooglith masquer and attacked the young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' {{1st}}
